description_long: This is a sealed package of Faragello Frozen Green Spinach, featuring a predominantly white background with green spinach leaves and a bowl of spinach depicted on the front. The front side displays the Faragello brand logo in red and white, along with product information in English and Arabic. The back side contains a detailed nutrition facts panel, multiple language translations, and additional branding. The packaging is a soft, flexible plastic bag, slightly puffed, suggesting it contains frozen spinach leaves inside. The sides of the package are narrow and show minimal graphics, mostly white with partial spinach leaf images. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed for retail display in a freezer section.
description: A white, flexible plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Green Spinach with green spinach graphics, red branding, and detailed nutritional labeling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Faragello logo, product name, and a bowl of spinach with green leaves on a white background.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the bag, mostly white with partial spinach leaf graphics and minimal text.
description_view_2: Back view displays the nutrition facts panel, multiple language translations, and additional branding elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim edge of the bag with some green leaf graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: The Faragello brand logo is visible on the front and back, featuring a red rectangular background with white text and a stylized 'F' above it.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package clearly states 'Frozen Green Spinach' in both English and Arabic, with images of spinach leaves and a bowl of spinach.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories, ingredients, and nutritional values in multiple languages.
